task: Make Day 1 coach answer selected LLM questions from session state

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, real entrypoint verification, scoped commits, and deploy verification for production-facing changes.
Production changes require actual runtime verification, source-of-truth deploy flow, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Added preferred_llm to the safety coach request contract and frontend askSafetyCoach payload.
Passed the current selected AI tool from local optimistic state, ui_state, intake, or customer fallback when asking the coach.
Added a deterministic backend answer path for questions asking which LLM or AI tool is currently selected.
Added the selected AI tool label to the normal safety coach prompt context for related follow-up questions.
Added regression tests for Perplexity selected-tool context and deterministic selected-LLM answers.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh harness-os/backend/main.py harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx harness-os/edu-app/src/lib/vpTraining.ts tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py docs/reports/completion_evidence/edu_training_selected_llm_coach_answer_20260701.json plus Mac Mini npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app and launchctl kickstart -k gui/$uid/com.harness.edu-app
deploy.result: deployed and verified: backend relaunched on port 8000, production edu-app bundle assets/index-BXPQCJB5.js is served, Mac Mini full edu VP training tests passed, and selected-LLM question answers Perplexity from session value

residual_risk: The app can answer which AI tool was selected inside the training flow; it still cannot verify whether that app is actually installed on the user's device.
